coding_decision: confirm stable respondent identifier across waves
missingness_decision: exclude records without confirmed person identifier
interpretation_boundary: linkage key only not an analysis exposure

coding_decision: confirm household identifier only if household-level linkage is needed
interpretation_boundary: household linkage is optional and not required for individual-level analysis

coding_decision: derive from wave or interview year
missingness_decision: records without wave cannot enter longitudinal linkage
interpretation_boundary: time index only not exposure timing by itself

coding_decision: define baseline wave before exposure and covariates
missingness_decision: exclude participants missing baseline eligibility variables
interpretation_boundary: baseline timing must be explicit before longitudinal claims
notes: Define the baseline wave used for exposure/covariate measurement.

coding_decision: define follow-up wave before outcome ascertainment
missingness_decision: document loss to follow-up before outcome modeling
interpretation_boundary: follow-up timing supports temporality only after attrition assessment
notes: Define the follow-up wave used for outcome ascertainment.

coding_decision: derive age in years and assess plausible range
missingness_decision: flag missing or implausible age before modeling

coding_decision: record coding labels from CHARLS codebook
missingness_decision: flag missing or ambiguous coding before modeling
interpretation_boundary: demographic adjustment variable not biological mechanism claim

missingness_decision: document missing education and category collapsing
interpretation_boundary: socioeconomic covariate interpretation depends on coding

coding_decision: confirm urban/rural or hukou variable selected
missingness_decision: document migration or inconsistent residence coding
interpretation_boundary: residence categories are context markers not causal mechanisms
notes: Urban/rural or hukou/residence variable depending on analysis.

missingness_decision: document missing exposure and exclusion/imputation rule
interpretation_boundary: do not infer causal effect from exposure timing alone
notes: Define before modeling; do not infer causal language from exposure timing alone.

coding_decision: record whether cross-sectional or longitudinal weight is used
missingness_decision: document missing or inapplicable weight handling
interpretation_boundary: weight decision defines target population and must match estimand

missingness_decision: report attrition and compare baseline characteristics before outcome claims
interpretation_boundary: attrition can bias longitudinal associations and must be discussed
notes: Required for longitudinal attrition and selection assessment.

missingness_decision: document missing outcome and censoring/exclusion rule
interpretation_boundary: outcome timing must follow baseline exposure for longitudinal interpretation
